stemHtml: An aircraft is cleared to fly offset using RNAV with no specified limits. While flying the offset path, the pilots experience a communication failure. What is the correct course of action?

options.a: Deviate from the current course and try to establish communications with an alternative ATC station.
options.b: Circle in your current position while trying to fix the communication failure.
options.c: Maintain the last assigned speed and level for a period of 10 minutes.
options.d: Return to the flight plan route no later than the next significant point.
